2026-04-07T02:55:55.5351534Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'core\.sshCommand' && git config --local --unset-all 'core.sshCommand' || :"
2026-04-07T02:55:55.5353232Z Removing HTTP extra header
2026-04-07T02:55:55.5354015Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader
2026-04-07T02:55:55.5356490Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader' && git config --local --unset-all 'http.https://github.com/.extraheader' || :"
2026-04-07T02:55:55.5358997Z Removing includeIf entries pointing to credentials config files
2026-04-07T02:55:55.5359856Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp ^includeIf\.gitdir:
2026-04-07T02:55:55.5361547Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive git config --local --show-origin --name-only --get-regexp remote.origin.url
